title: Paraboea prolixa
taxonomy: Paraboea prolixa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This family includes a diverse group of plants commonly known as the African violet or gesneriad family. The genus Paraboea is a small group of plants, mainly found in Southeast Asia. Members of this genus are often epiphytic or terrestrial plants, growing in shaded forest environments. Paraboea prolixa is one of the species within this genus, and its classification is further supported by molecular phylogenetic studies.
